description: Embark on a mesmerizing 5 Nights / 6 Days journey through the Paradise of Kashmir, exploring its most iconic destinations. Begin your trip in Srinagar, the city of lakes, where the charm of Shikara rides on Dal Lake and the Mughal Gardens’ elegance set a magical tone. Continue to Gulmarg, a world-famous ski resort and meadow of flowers, where snow-clad peaks, the thrilling Gondola ride, and vast meadows offer breathtaking views. A scenic drive takes you to Sonmarg – the Meadow of Gold, surrounded by lofty glaciers and alpine meadows, perfect for nature walks and pony rides. Your journey then unfolds in Pahalgam – the Valley of Shepherds, known for its lush pine forests, Lidder River, and cinematic beauty that has captivated travelers for generations. With each day, Kashmir’s rich culture, warm hospitality, and unparalleled landscapes promise unforgettable memories, making this 6-day escape truly heavenly.
cost_includes:
3 star premium hotel stay
 All transfers and sightseeing by AC Vehicle
 This cost valid for 6 adults traveling together
 Breakfast, Dinner
 Toll Tax
 Parking
 Driver Allowance
Travel Goodies
 24 x 7 On tour Assistance
 All cost from EX Destination
cost_excludes:
Any meals other than those mentioned above in inclusions
 Airfare / Train Ticket
 GST 5%
 All monument entry Fees
 Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water, telephone charges, and all items of personal nature
 Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions
Entrance fees to Monuments & other sightseeing points
Expenses caused by factors beyond our control like rail and flight delays, roadblocks, vehicle malfunctions, political disturbances, etc.
Anything not mentioned in inclusions

faqs.title: 1. What is included in the ₹23,777/- package?
faqs.content: The package includes accommodation for 5 nights, daily breakfast & dinner, sightseeing tours of Srinagar, Gulmarg, Sonmarg, and Pahalgam, Shikara ride in Dal Lake (complimentary), and transportation in a private vehicle as per itinerary.

faqs.title: 2. What is not included in the package?
faqs.content: Exclusions are airfare/train tickets, personal expenses, optional activities (such as Gondola rides in Gulmarg or pony rides in Sonmarg/Pahalgam), lunch, camera fees, and any additional costs beyond the itinerary.

faqs.title: 3. What type of hotels will be provided?
faqs.content: We provide 3-star category hotels/houseboats with clean and comfortable rooms. Upgrades to 4-star or 5-star hotels can be arranged at an additional cost.

faqs.title: 4.Is this package suitable for families and couples?
faqs.content: Yes ✅. The itinerary is designed to balance sightseeing, leisure, and relaxation, making it ideal for families, couples, and even groups of friends.

faqs.title: 5.Is the price per person or for two people?
faqs.content: The quoted price of ₹23,777/- is per person on a twin-sharing basis. Single occupancy will attract an additional supplement charge.

faqs.title: 6. Are permits required for any sightseeing?
faqs.content: Yes, certain areas (like Sonmarg & Gulmarg) may require local permits which will be assisted by our team. Costs are usually nominal and not included in the package.

faqs.title: 7. What should I pack for this trip?
faqs.content: Warm clothes (jackets, sweaters, gloves, especially for Gulmarg & Sonmarg) Comfortable shoes for walking/trekking Sunscreen & sunglasses Valid photo ID proof for hotel check-ins and permits

faqs.title: 8. How do I confirm my booking?
faqs.content: A minimum advance payment (usually 30-40% of package cost) is required to confirm the booking, with the balance payable before the trip starts.
